title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 model is built on Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active, 256K context) with coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The system uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to balance speed and depth, and is evaluated on Cursor Bench, an internal benchmark of ambiguous prompts and multi-file diffs from real engineer queries.
